TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Tekelay, title = Tekelay, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tekelay} }

S.FORM: Tekelay u nani' ni Kuli.Huisin.Sayuen (u kamu nu Hulam:ŤÄēŤéė‚ÄßśííŤÄėÁöĄŤ≤ď) kakaliman salaedan :ŚčēÁČ©ÁēĆ Animalia (aadupen nu salaedan) kulus :ŤĄäÁīĘŚčēÁČ©ťĖÄ Chordata (kulus nu aadupen) udip :ŚďļšĻ≥Á∂Ī Mammalia (micucuay a udip) mata :ť£üŤāČÁõģ Carnivora samataan :Ť≤ďÁßĎ Felidae (samataan nu nani') mikeliday :Ť≤ďŚĪ¨ Felis (pazazan muladay tu nani') malecaday :Ť≤ď F. catus (malecaday tu nani') nilaculan tama takuliaway nu nani'
S.PHON: t…ôk…ôr~…ĺaj u nani Ē~ ° ni kur~…ĺi.ńßuisin.saju…ôn (u kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam:*******) kakar~…ĺiman sar~…ĺa…ôdan :*** animar~…ĺia (aadup…ôn nu sar~…ĺa…ôdan) kur~…ĺus :***** ¶ńßordata (kur~…ĺus nu aadup…ôn) udip :*** mammar~…ĺia (mi ¶u ¶uaj a udip) mata :*** ¶arni*ora samataan :** f…ôr~…ĺida…ô (samataan nu nani Ē~ °) mik…ôr~…ĺidaj :** f…ôr~…ĺis (pazazan mur~…ĺadaj tu nani Ē~ °) mar~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj :* f. ¶atus (mar~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj tu nani Ē~ °) nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan tama takur~…ĺiawaj nu nani Ē~ °
